inSignalEnable.description: Signal name that starts the delay.

inSignalDisable.description: Signal name that cancels the delay.

outSignalComplete.description: Signal emitted when the delay completes.

expiryInfoPart.description: Countdown UI text or slate expression.

expiryInfoPartTip.description: Countdown UI tooltip text or slate expression.

inspectString.description: Inspect string shown while the delay is active.

inspectStringTargets.description: SlateRef<IEnumerable<ISelectable>> inspect string target variables or expression.

delayTicksRange.description: SlateRef<IntRange?> random delay range in ticks.

isQuestTimeout.description: SlateRef<bool> literal, expression, or $varName; true marks this delay as quest timeout.

reactivatable.description: SlateRef<bool> literal, expression, or $varName; true allows restart.

waitUntilPlayerHasHomeMap.description: SlateRef<bool> literal, expression, or $varName; true waits for a home map.

useAcceptanceExpiry.description: SlateRef<bool> literal, expression, or $varName; use quest acceptance expiry ticks.

node.description: QuestNode run when the delay completes.
